working_on: Routine task P5-04b: Ethics applied seed — seventh routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; pre-split b-half (P5-04a metaethics+normative was the a-half) per phase_5.md T1-B with depends_on [P5-01a, P5-04a] satisfied (P5-04a closed at S-0058). declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0026_seed_ethics_part1.sql with ~25-30 nodes across applied ethics layers: (1) Bioethics (~9-11: bioethics umbrella, medical_ethics, four_principles_bioethics — Beauchamp & Childress 1979 — autonomy, beneficence, non_maleficence, justice_distributive_in_bioethics, informed_consent, research_ethics, end_of_life_ethics, reproductive_ethics, neuroethics); (2) Environmental ethics (~9-11: environmental_ethics umbrella, anthropocentrism, biocentrism, ecocentrism, deep_ecology — Naess 1973, animal_ethics — Singer 1975 / Regan 1983, sentientism, climate_ethics, future_generations, intergenerational_justice, non_identity_problem — Parfit 1984); (3) Applied moral problems (~6-9: applied_ethics umbrella, just_war_theory — jus ad bellum / jus in bello / jus post bellum, pacifism, terrorism, business_ethics, technology_ethics, ai_ethics, machine_ethics or value_alignment, distributive_justice_applied as an applied counterpart to political philosophy P5-05's foundational treatment). Plus ~30-40 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges: umbrellas to theses; cross-references back into P5-04a's normative-theory anchors (consequentialism, deontology, virtue_ethics, contractualism, supererogation, moral_responsibility-via-normative_ethics) where pedagogically required for applied derivations; structural edges between bioethics / environmental / applied-problems clusters where they share inputs (e.g., autonomy → informed_consent; intergenerational_justice → climate_ethics). Apply migration via Supabase MCP apply_migration (single call if body fits; chunked-execute_sql + apply_migration marker pattern from S-0058 if not). Run engine/tools/validate.py with venv Python so live graph audit engages.
